header.title: Settings
header.description: Manage your account details and sign-in credentials.

layout.businessDescription: Manage your account details and sign-in credentials.
layout.integrationsDescription: Connect your favorite tools and applications.
layout.billingDescription: Review your hosted plan, add-ons, and recent billing activity.
layout.usageDescription: Track hosted usage, plan limits, and reset timing for this billing period.

toast.portalFailed: Unable to open the customer portal.

currentPlan.title: Your plan
currentPlan.description: Hosted billing applies only to cloud workspaces. Self-host keeps the full product with your own providers.
currentPlan.billingContactMissing: No billing contact on file yet.
currentPlan.selfHostNotice: Self-hosted workspaces use your own providers. No usage limits or billing apply.
currentPlan.enterpriseNotice: Usage and limits are governed by your enterprise agreement.
currentPlan.freeCloudNotice: Usage is capped at the included pool each month. Upgrade to Pro for overage billing and higher limits.
currentPlan.proNotice: Included usage resets monthly. Additional usage is billed at the overage rate.

usage.title: Included usage
usage.paygDescription: Additional billable usage in this period. Resets on {{resetAt}}.
usage.aiSmsLocked: Activate the AI SMS add-on to unlock.
usage.overageEnabled: Additional usage is billed as overage.
usage.blockedDescription: Limit reached — usage paused until next period.
usage.noOverages: No overages — usage hard-capped at the included pool.

catalog.title: Hosted offers
catalog.description: Hosted workspaces use the shared sender for alerts until AI SMS registration is approved. After approval, both alerts and AI SMS move onto the business number while billing stays split by usage type.
catalog.selfHostDescription: Free forever. Full product, bring your own AI keys, Twilio account, numbers, and compliance setup.
catalog.freeCloudDescription: $0 per month. No overages and no AI SMS.
catalog.freeCloudLimits: Includes {{voiceMinutes}} voice minutes, {{alertSmsSegments}} Alert SMS segments, and {{outboundAttempts}} outbound call attempts per month.
catalog.proDescription: {{amount}} per month with one business number included and hosted overages after the included pool is used.
catalog.proOverages: Pro overages: {{voiceRate}} per extra voice minute, {{alertSmsRate}} per extra Alert SMS segment, and {{outboundAttemptRate}} per extra outbound call attempt.
catalog.aiSmsAddon: AI SMS add-on: {{monthly}} per month + {{setup}} one-time setup. AI SMS usage is billed at {{usage}} per segment.

addon.title: Add-ons
addon.aiSmsDescription: Allows your agent to send and reply to SMS autonomously after 10DLC approval.
addon.aiSmsSetupRequiredDescription: AI SMS billing is active, but 10DLC registration still needs to be completed before alerts and AI SMS can use the business number.
addon.aiSmsSetupRequiredNotice: Alerts stay on the shared hosted sender until approval. AI SMS remains blocked while Twilio reviews the registration.

compliance.title: AI SMS compliance
compliance.description: Register your business for A2P 10DLC so hosted alerts and AI replies can use the approved business number.

senderMode.platformPhone: alerts stay on the shared hosted sender
senderMode.businessPhone: messages send from the business number directly
senderMode.businessMessagingService: alerts and AI SMS send through the approved business Messaging Service

toast.saveFailed: Unable to save the SMS compliance draft.
toast.submitFailed: Unable to update the SMS compliance registration.

fields.brandContactEmail: Brand contact email (required for public companies)

spendingCap.title: Monthly spending cap
spendingCap.description: Set a maximum overage spend per billing period. When reached, usage beyond the included pool will be blocked.

transactions.title: Transaction history
transactions.description: Orders, refunds, and setup fees synced from Polar.

appearance.title: Preferences
appearance.description: Set your dashboard language, time format, and theme.

language.label: Dashboard language
language.description: Choose the language used in the dashboard.

theme.label: Theme
theme.lightDescription: Bright surfaces with soft contrast for daytime work.
theme.darkDescription: Dimmed surfaces that keep late sessions easier on the eyes.

google.sheetDescription: Connect a Google Calendar and choose which calendar receives bookings.
google.connectionSectionDescription: Connect or reconnect the Google account that should receive bookings.
google.calendarSectionDescription: Choose the calendar to sync and review the latest sync state.
google.chooseStaffFirst: Choose the team member whose Google Calendar you want to connect.
google.disconnectConfirmDescription: This will remove the current Google Calendar connection for bookings.
google.connectFailed: Unable to complete the Google Calendar connection.
google.chooseCalendarFirst: Choose a Google calendar before saving.
google.calendarSaveFailed: Unable to save the selected Google calendar.
google.mappedConnectionsDescription: Each Google connection belongs to one bookable team member.
google.noConnections: No Google Calendar connections exist yet.
google.notConnectedForStaff: This team member does not have a connected Google Calendar yet.
google.notConnectedDescription: Connect Google Calendar to start syncing bookings.
google.noStaff: Add a bookable team member before connecting Google Calendar.

google.title: Google Calendar
google.description: Sync bookings with a Google Calendar.

summary.title: Calendar sync summary
summary.description: A quick view of how the integration layer is performing.

profile.title: Receptionist Profile
profile.description: Define the voice, tone, booking policy, and transfer rules that shape your receptionist.

businessName.label: Business name
businessName.description: This is the name shown across the dashboard and customer-facing business details.

changeEmail.label: Change email
changeEmail.description: Email address you use to log in.
changeEmail.title: Email
changeEmail.confirmationSent: We sent a confirmation link to {{email}}.

errors.alreadyExists: An account with that email already exists.
errors.noEmail: No email is configured for this account yet.
errors.missingSiteUrl: Email confirmation isn't configured yet. Set SITE_URL on the Convex deployment and try again.
errors.failed: We couldn't send a confirmation link. Please try again.

changePassword.title: Password
changePassword.label: Change password
changePassword.description: Password you use to log in.
changePassword.dialogDescription: Enter your current password and a new password.

hours.title: Opening Hours
hours.description: Structured hours stay authoritative over documents and help the receptionist answer availability questions reliably.
hours.leaveBlank: Leave a day blank to mark it closed.

services.title: Services
services.description: Service definitions power both booking logic and the receptionist snapshot callers hear.

phoneRouting.title: Phone Number Routing
phoneRouting.description: Map Twilio numbers to this business so live calls and SMS load the correct receptionist snapshot.
phoneRouting.saveFailed: Failed to save phone number routing.
phoneRouting.noSid: No Twilio Phone SID saved yet.
phoneRouting.empty: No Twilio numbers are mapped yet. Add the live number you configured in Twilio using exact E.164 format.

team.title: Bookable Team
team.description: Booking only works for services that have at least one active team member assigned.
team.name: Name
team.assignmentDescription: Choose which services each team member can book over phone or SMS.
team.emptyStaff: Add at least one team member before assigning services.
team.emptyServices: Add services first, then come back here to make them bookable.

snapshot.title: Receptionist Snapshot
snapshot.description: The voice gateway pulls this business context once when a live call begins.
snapshot.emptyDigest: No generated digest yet. Add knowledge or documents to enrich the receptionist.

nextSteps.title: What to do next
nextSteps.description: Tighten the live receptionist behavior before you route real traffic.
nextSteps.hours: Set hours, services, and bookable team assignments so booking can suggest real times.
nextSteps.transfer: Add transfer rules and a fallback number before handing off urgent calls.
nextSteps.snapshot: Refresh your snapshot after major policy changes so voice picks them up quickly.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.description: Choose which events trigger an alert to your phone or email.

sources.title: Sources
sources.description: Select where and when you'll be notified

email.title: Email
email.description: Receive notifications in your email client.

sms.title: SMS
sms.description: Receive text message notifications on your phone.

voiceMessage.title: Voice message captured
voiceMessage.description: When the AI takes a callback or follow-up message during a call.

pausedSms.title: New message in paused SMS conversation
pausedSms.description: When SMS automation is manually paused and the customer sends another message.

smsFailed.title: Customer SMS notification failed
smsFailed.description: When an appointment confirmation or reminder SMS fails or is undelivered.

calendarSync.title: Calendar sync issue
calendarSync.description: When an appointment cannot sync to the calendar and needs attention.

transferFailed.title: Live call transfer failed
transferFailed.description: When the AI tried to transfer a caller to a human, but the transfer did not complete.

aiReplyFailed.title: SMS AI reply failed
aiReplyFailed.description: When the system fails to generate or send an AI SMS reply.

dailySummary.title: Daily summary
dailySummary.description: Receive a single daily email summarizing call activity and new messages.

sendTime.title: Send time
sendTime.description: The time of day your daily summary will be sent.
